metadata.scheme_name: Award to Scheduled Castes Students Who Secured Top Ranks at State and District Level in Standard X & XII (Sahuji Maharaj Assistance)

raw_data.details: The scheme “Award to Scheduled Castes Students Who Secured Top Ranks at State and District Level in Standard X & XII” is initiated by the Director Scheduled Caste Welfare, Department of Social Justice & Empowerment, Government of Gujarat. Under the scheme, the Scheduled Castes Category students who have Secured Top Ranks at the State and District Levels in Gujarat in Standard X & XII are given cash prizes. Cash prizes are awarded to the first three students who secure the highest ranks in both Standard X and Standard XII across all streams.
raw_data.benefits: Award/Cash Prizes Details at State Level:Sl. No. Student’s RankAward for Standard XAward for Standard XII (For All Stream)1First₹41,000₹31,0002Second₹21,000₹21,0003Third₹11,000₹11,000Award/Cash Prizes Details at District Level:Sl. No. Student's RankAward for Standard XAward for Standard XII (For All Stream)1First ₹6,0006,0002Second₹5,0005,0003Third₹4,0004,000
raw_data.eligibility: The students should belong to the Scheduled Castes Category of Gujarat. The students who have Secured Top Ranks at the State and District Levels in Gujarat in Standard X & Standard XII across all streams are eligible for cash prizes. There is no income limit.
raw_data.application_process: OfflineUnder this scheme, the list of students is obtained from the Gujarat Secondary and Higher Secondary Board and the award is given to the selected students accordingly.
raw_data.documents_required: Passport size photoIdentity proof i.e. Aadhaar CardCaste Certificate from the Competent AuthoritiesEducational certificate/MarksheetIdentity Card (School)Any other documents as required
raw_data.scheme_name: Award to Scheduled Castes Students Who Secured Top Ranks at State and District Level in Standard X & XII (Sahuji Maharaj Assistance)

faqs.question: Who initiated this scheme?
faqs.answer: The scheme is initiated by the Director Scheduled Caste Welfare, Department of Social Justice & Empowerment, Government of Gujarat.

faqs.question: What are the benefits of the scheme?
faqs.answer: Cash prizes are awarded to students who secure the highest ranks in both Standard X and Standard XII across all streams at both state and district levels.

faqs.question: What are the award details for state-level rankers?
faqs.answer: For Standard X, the first three students receive ₹41,000, ₹21,000, and ₹11,000. For Standard XII, the prizes are ₹31,000, ₹21,000, and ₹11,000 respectively.

faqs.question: What are the award details for district-level rankers?
faqs.answer: For Standard X, the first three students receive ₹6,000, ₹5,000, and ₹4,000. For Standard XII, the prizes are ₹6,000, ₹5,000, and ₹4,000 respectively.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for these cash prizes?
faqs.answer: Students belonging to the Scheduled Castes Category of Gujarat who secure top ranks at both state and district levels in Standard X & XII exams are eligible.

faqs.question: Are there any income limits for eligibility?
faqs.answer: No, there is no income limit for eligibility under this scheme.

faqs.question: How can students avail the benefits of this scheme?
faqs.answer: The list of eligible students is obtained from the Gujarat Secondary and Higher Secondary Board, and cash awards are given to selected students accordingly.

faqs.question: How are the winners selected?
faqs.answer: Winners are selected based on their rankings provided by the Gujarat Secondary and Higher Secondary Board.
